app.name: AeroX Protect
confirm.delete.title: Confirm deletion
confirm.delete.desc: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.delete.named: Delete “{name}”? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.revoke.title: Confirm revoke
confirm.revoke.desc: Are you sure you want to revoke this? Access will stop working immediately.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.locked: Too many attempts — account locked. Try again later.
lpr.disabled: License-plate recognition is off. An admin can enable it in Settings → Feature flags (needs a plate-OCR model on a detector node).
face.disabled: Face recognition is off. An admin can enable it in Settings → Feature flags (needs a face-embedding model on a detector node).
face.privacy_note: Biometric data — enroll only with consent. Deleting an identity erases its stored embeddings.
face.consent: I have consent to enroll this person
fed.disabled: Multi-NVR federation is off. An admin can enable it in Settings → Feature flags.
fed.no_cameras: No cameras — add and sync a member
portal.title: Remote portal (TURN)
portal.desc: ICE servers for WebRTC live/playback from outside the LAN. Needs a coturn server with a static-auth-secret.
portal.secret_set: secret set — leave blank to keep
twilio.title: SMS alerts (Twilio)
twilio.desc: SMS alerts are sent from event triggers / automation rules. Here you only configure the Twilio account used to send them.
twilio.status_off: Not configured — no SMS will be sent
twilio.token_set: token set — leave blank to keep
access.disabled: Access control is off. An admin can enable it in Settings → Feature flags (needs door controllers / readers).
dashboard.title: Dashboard
users.title: User management
users.name: Name
users.admin_full: The admin role already has full access. Set granular permissions on non-admin roles.
settings.title: Settings
settings.gpu.desc: GPU acceleration for AI detection is controlled on the AI settings page.
settings.timezone.desc: Site timezone used to interpret recording schedules.
settings.default_language.desc: Default UI language for new users and first visit. A user's own choice overrides it.
settings.base_url.desc: Base address used when building public share links. Leave blank to use the current origin. e.g. https://nvr.example.com
settings.base_url_invalid: Must start with http:// or https://.
settings.webrtc_ip.desc: The server's LAN address, advertised to browsers so low-latency WebRTC live works on the local network. Leave blank to disable WebRTC (live falls back to MSE). e.g. 192.168.1.10
settings.webrtc_ip_invalid: Must be a valid IP address.
settings.flags.desc: Turn optional advanced features on or off. Disabling them never affects core functions like live view, recording, playback and events.
flag.bookmarks.desc: Mark important moments with bookmarks and labels on the timeline.
flag.live_sequence.desc: Auto-cycle the live grid on a dwell timer and spotlight a camera when an event fires.
flag.share_links.desc: Create clip/event links non-members can open with an expiry and password.
flag.semantic_search.desc: Type in plain language; a CLIP model finds visually/semantically similar scenes.
flag.two_way_audio.desc: Browser↔camera two-way talk on supported cameras.
flag.privacy_masks.desc: Hide chosen regions to protect privacy.
flag.maps.desc: Place cameras on a map and click a pin to jump to live.
flag.sms_notifications.desc: Send SMS alerts on events via Twilio.
flag.archiving.desc: Offload recordings to S3 / SMB / local storage.
flag.object_counting.desc: Count line crossings and area occupancy.
flag.loitering.desc: Flag loitering when a track dwells in an area beyond a threshold.
flag.doorbell.desc: When a doorbell/intercom rings, a call popup shows the live view so you can answer with two-way audio or open the door (SIP/ONVIF doorbell integration).
flag.dual_recording.desc: Record the sub (low-res) stream alongside the main one. Enabled per camera.
flag.edge_recording.desc: Backfill gaps (from a network/NVR outage) by importing the camera's SD-card clips.
flag.audio_detection.desc: Classify sounds like glass-break, scream, alarm into events (model recommended).
flag.smoke_detection.desc: Aux smoke/flame detection via a dedicated model — may false-positive; not a certified fire alarm.
flag.lpr.desc: Read plates and match a watchlist (deny/allow). Needs a dedicated OCR model.
flag.face.desc: Identify people against an enrolled registry with consent + retention. Needs a dedicated model.
flag.federation.desc: Aggregate cameras and events from several NVRs into one view.
flag.remote_portal.desc: TURN/STUN relay so live/playback works from outside the LAN. Needs a coturn server.
flag.access_control.desc: Control doors with cards/credentials and log access events. Needs door controllers/readers.
bookmark.label: Label
bookmark.lock.desc: Protect this recording from automatic deletion.
camera.batch.title: Add multiple cameras
camera.batch.hosts: Camera list (one per line: name, IP)
share.title: Create share link
share.once: This link won't be shown again. Copy it now.
share.gone.desc: Contact the person who shared it.
search.placeholder: e.g. person in red, white truck, intrusion
search.disabled: Semantic search is disabled. Enable it in Settings → Feature flags.
search.hash_note: Text-based search for now. Installing a CLIP model upgrades this to image semantic search automatically.
mask.title: Privacy masking
mask.name: Name
mask.hint: Click the image to add vertices of the area to hide (3+)
export.watermark.desc: Burns user/time info into the video (re-encode)
archive.disabled: Archiving is disabled. Enable it in Settings → Feature flags.
archive.name: Name
map.disabled: Map monitoring is disabled. Enable it in Settings → Feature flags.
map.place_hint: Pick a camera, then click the map to place it
map.cfg_desc: Choose the base layer for geo maps. Google Maps requires an API key.
map.cfg_key_set: Key is set (enter a new key to replace)
map.cfg_key_hint: Must be a client key with the 'Map Tiles API' enabled in Google Cloud; restrict it by HTTP referrer.
map.name: Name
discovery.title: Auto-discover on network
discovery.hint: Finds ONVIF cameras on the same network via multicast.
discovery.none: No cameras found. Check they're on the same subnet and the container uses host networking.
camera.name: Name
camera.fisheye_confirm_on: Turn on fisheye dewarp for ‘{name}’? The live view will show the flattened (virtual-PTZ) image.
camera.fisheye_confirm_off: Turn off fisheye dewarp for ‘{name}’? The live view will return to the raw fisheye image.
camera.dual_hint: Record a secondary stream alongside the main one.
camera.dual_stream_hint: Main is always recorded. Pick which extra stream to also record.
camera.ai_hint: Choose which AI analytics run on this camera. Each needs a detector node with the matching model installed to actually work.
camera.ai.audio.desc: Detects sounds such as screams, glass breaking or alarms and raises events.
camera.ai.smoke.desc: Detects smoke or flames in the video.
camera.ai.face.desc: Recognizes enrolled faces and tags them on events.
camera.ai.lpr.desc: Reads vehicle license plates and records them.
edge.title: Edge recording import
edge.enable_hint: Camera has an SD card for gap-fill import.
edge.auto_hint: Automatically backfill recent gaps from SD every 30 min (when edge recording is on).
edge.no_gaps: No gaps in this range — timeline is complete.
camera.live_transcode.desc: Turn on if an H.265 camera won't show in the browser. Transcodes once no matter how many people watch, and stops when nobody is watching. (Uses server CPU.)
camera.detect_failed: Auto-detect failed. Check the connection settings.
camera.probe.failed: Connection test failed. Check the connection details.
dashboard.name: Name
storage.discovered: {count} new disk(s) detected — add to the recording pool?
storage.raid.title: RAID & disk reliability guide
storage.raid.intro: A single disk loses footage if it fails. Mirror important recordings with RAID or a separate backup (archive). The health indicator is based on usage/reachability; SMART details require smartctl on the host.
storage.raid.mdadm: Linux software RAID: build RAID1 (mirror) / RAID5·6 (parity) with mdadm; check with `mdadm --detail /dev/md0`.
storage.raid.zfs: Want checksums/snapshots? Prefer ZFS (zpool) / btrfs RAID — bit-rot detection + rebuild.
storage.raid.degraded: Check degraded/rebuild state from the OS: `zpool status`, `cat /proc/mdstat`. Resync after replacing a disk.
storage.raid.encryption: At-rest encryption: prefer disk-level LUKS/dm-crypt (fast, no seek/copy penalty) or btrfs/ZFS encryption. Manage keys via OS/HSM and back them up — losing the key means permanent data loss.
retention.subtitle: Recording retention for this camera. Leave fields blank to inherit the global policy.
retention.over_hint: Action when the retention/size limit is exceeded.
retention.blank_global: Blank inherits the global policy (not unlimited).
schedule.hint: Drag to paint a day×hour rectangle at once. Continuous is the default (KST).
policy.subtitle: Define record/notify behavior per event type (camera policies override global).
policy.timing.help: Pre buffer: seconds kept before the event. Post buffer: seconds kept after it. Cooldown: minimum gap before the same event records/alerts again.
policy.cooldown.help: When the same event fires repeatedly, repeats within this many seconds are ignored — prevents alert/recording storms.
bookmark.on_time: Bookmark at the current playback position.
recording.manual_pick: Choose a duration or enter your own.
protect.label: Protect
protect.hint: Protect this event's recording from auto-cleanup (retention / quota).
timelapse.future_hint: Future range — it will be generated automatically once the period has elapsed.
ai.audio_hint: Classify camera audio (glass break / scream / alarm…). Needs a camera with audio; PANNs model when present, else a coarse stub.
count.name: Name
count.hint_line: Click two points to draw a crossing line
count.hint_region: Click to draw a region (3+ points)
ai.zone_hint: Click the image to add polygon points (≥3).
ai.trigger_subtitle: Rules that promote a detection to an event (record/notify is decided by event policy).
ai.hwaccel_hint: HW decode (NVDEC/VAAPI…) for export/timelapse re-encode. Falls back to CPU if unsupported.
ai.gpu_hint: The built-in detector picks CUDA/CPU. Changing this reconfigures nodes.
ai.join_token_hint: Register an external node with this one-time token (handle securely).
auto.object_label: What to detect (pick one or more)
auto.min_score_label: Only when sensitivity (score) is at least
auto.cond_help: Run only when, in addition to this event, other events also occur (AND) or any of them occurs (OR) within the time window. Leave empty to run on this event alone.
auto.push_message_ph: Text shown in the push notification
auto.incoming_hint: After saving, an incoming webhook URL is generated so external systems can run this automation.
auto.act.speaker: Play audio on speaker
auto.tokens_subtitle: Scoped API tokens for external integrations (Home Assistant, etc).
auto.token_once: This token won't be shown again — copy it now.
auto.notif_subtitle: Per-event notification channel / priority / quiet-hours subscriptions.
auto.push_unsupported: This browser doesn't support web push.
mon.name: Name
mon.code_hint: Enter on the monitor device ({s}s left)
error.forbidden.title: Access denied
error.forbidden.desc: You don't have permission to view this page.
error.notfound.title: Page not found
